translation.settings.title: Settings
translation.onboarding.welcome.title: Private Messaging
translation.onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Secure, decentralized, and anonymous.
translation.onboarding.welcome.features.encrypted.de: Your messages are only readable by you and your recipient.
translation.onboarding.welcome.features.decentralize: Built on Nostr, ensuring no single entity owns your data.
translation.onboarding.welcome.passphrase.label: Identity Passphrase (Optional)
translation.onboarding.welcome.passphrase.placeholde: Enter a secure passphrase (or leave blank)
translation.onboarding.welcome.passphrase.help: This passphrase encrypts your identity locally. Don't lose it!
translation.onboarding.welcome.disclaimer: Ready to join? Click 'Get Started' to create your anonymous account instantly.
translation.onboarding.creating.title: Creating Your Identity
translation.onboarding.creating.desc: Generating cryptographic keys for your secure profile...
translation.onboarding.username.title: Choose your username
translation.onboarding.username.subtitle: How should others find you on the network?
translation.onboarding.username.label: Username
translation.onboarding.username.help: At least 3 characters. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
translation.onboarding.connection.title: Build Your Network
translation.onboarding.connection.desc: Have a friend's invite code? Enter it below to start your first private conversation.
translation.onboarding.complete.title: Setup Complete!
translation.onboarding.complete.securityDesc: Your keys are safely stored and encrypted on this device.
translation.messaging.gettingStartedDesc: Complete these steps to start your secure messaging journey.
translation.messaging.unlockIdentityDesc: Decrypt your private key to sign messages.
translation.messaging.connectRelaysDesc: Connect to the Nostr network to send/receive.
translation.messaging.startAChatDesc: Find a friend or join a group.
translation.messaging.identityLockedDesc: Your session is locked to protect your privacy.
translation.messaging.selectConversationDesc: Choose a chat from the sidebar or start a new one to begin messaging.
translation.messaging.shareDesc: Share your public key with others to let them message you.
translation.messaging.pubkeySafeShare: Public keys are safe to share!
translation.messaging.nip04Desc: This key is used to sign your encrypted messages and profile updates.
translation.messaging.error.nip05.fetch_failed: Failed to connect to the domain's server.
translation.messaging.error.nip05.not_found: Identifier not found on this domain.
translation.messaging.strangerWarningDesc: You haven't accepted this connection request yet. You can accept to start messaging, ignore to hide this, or block to prevent further connection.
translation.messaging.waitingForAcceptanceDesc: You've sent a request to {{name}}. Once they accept, you'll be able to see each other's status and messages will flow normally.
translation.messaging.noPendingRequestsDesc: New conversations from people you haven't accepted yet will appear here.
translation.messaging.pendingRequestsHelp: Requests are messages from users you haven't approved yet. They cannot see your online status until you accept.
translation.messaging.connectionPending: Connection request pending. Accept to start messaging.
translation.messaging.recipientNotFound: Recipient profile not found on your relays. Delivery might be unreliable.
translation.messaging.deleteForMePermissionDescripti: "Delete for me" hides selected messages only in your interface.
translation.messaging.deleteForEveryonePermissionDes: "Delete for everyone" removes only messages you sent from all participants' interfaces.
translation.messaging.shareInviteLinkDesc: Share your invite link so they can find you.
translation.messaging.userNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find this user on the connected relays. They might be new or not broadcasting yet.
translation.messaging.chatStart: This is the start of your encrypted conversation.
translation.messaging.connectionRequestsNote: Messages will be sent as connection requests until accepted.
translation.messaging.dropToUploadDesc: Images or videos will be attached to your message
translation.messaging.noMedia: No media found in this conversation
translation.messaging.noProfileFoundDesc: This user hasn't published a profile yet, but you can still send them message requests using their public key.
translation.identity.title: Your Identity
translation.identity.description: This is your cryptographic identity on the Nostr network.
translation.identity.privateKeyWarning: Never share your private key. Anyone with this key can access your entire identity and history.
translation.identity.sessionActionDesc: Log out and remove keys from this device.
translation.auth.error.incorrectPassword: Incorrect password. If you've forgotten it, you can reset it using your Private Key.
translation.auth.error.usernameMismatch: Username does not match this device. Please check your spelling or use 'Import Key' to switch accounts.
translation.settings.tabs.privacyTrustDesc: Manage who you trust and who can reach you directly.
translation.settings.tabs.storageDesc: Configure where your file attachments are uploaded.
translation.settings.profilePublishFailed: Failed to publish. Check relay connections.
translation.settings.deleteAccountDesc: This will permanently remove your account key from this device and reset all local data. This action cannot be undone.
translation.settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account and reset all data? This cannot be undone.
translation.settings.health.title: System Health
translation.settings.health.desc: Monitor the status of your connection and identity.
translation.settings.updates.title: Updates
translation.settings.updates.desc: Keep your application up to date.
translation.settings.updates.help: Updates are checked automatically on startup. You can also manually trigger a check here.
translation.settings.notifications.unsupported: Your browser does not support desktop notifications.
translation.settings.notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked by your browser settings. Please enable them to receive alerts.
translation.settings.notifications.backgroundDesc: Enable background notifications to stay updated when the app is closed.
translation.settings.notifications.title: Notifications
translation.settings.notifications.desc: Manage how you want to be notified.
translation.settings.dmPrivacy.desc: Control who can send you direct messages.
translation.settings.dmPrivacy.filterNote: Stranger messages will be filtered out.
translation.settings.storage.externalDesc: Upload files directly to a Nostr storage provider.
translation.settings.storage.apiUrlDesc: The endpoint where files will be POSTed. Requires NIP-98 support for auth.
translation.settings.storage.localModeDesc: Local uploads are strictly for the Desktop app or private local relays. On Vercel, you must select an External Provider above.
translation.settings.storage.guidanceWhy: Web browsers cannot save files to servers directly without a dedicated storage layer like NIP-96.
translation.settings.storage.guidancePrivacy: Providers like void.cat prioritize no-logging policies and encryption headers.
translation.settings.storage.guidanceCapacity: nostr.build provides the most stable multi-device experience.
translation.settings.relays.title: Relay Connections
translation.settings.relays.desc: Manage your connections to Nostr relays.
translation.settings.relays.supportOnlyWss: Only secure wss:// URLs are supported.
translation.settings.relays.noRelaysDesc: Add a relay to start communicating.
translation.settings.relays.unlockToManage: Unlock your identity to manage relays.
translation.settings.relays.resetHelp: Use this if you are having trouble connecting or finding users.
translation.settings.relays.metadataWarning: Relay membership is public and shared with other users.
translation.settings.blocklist.title: Blocked Users
translation.settings.blocklist.desc: Managing blocked users. You won't receive messages from anyone on this list.
translation.settings.blocklist.unlockToManage: Unlock your identity to view blocked users.
translation.profile.title: Profile
translation.profile.description: Customize your public presence on the network.
translation.profile.usernameHelp: This name will be visible to others when you interact.
translation.profile.avatarHelp: Enter an image URL or upload one to use as your avatar.
translation.profile.nip05Help: An optional identifier like an email for human-readable discovery.
translation.profile.inviteCodeHelp: Share this code with others so they can find you. Format: OBSCUR-XXXXXX
translation.profile.ghostAccountDesc: If others can't find you, click **Save & Publish** to broadcast your profile to all connected relays.
translation.appearance.title: Appearance
translation.appearance.desc: Customize how the application looks and feels.
translation.settings.appearance.title: Appearance
translation.settings.appearance.desc: Customize how the application looks and feels.
translation.settings.selectLanguageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
translation.settings.appearance.themeDesc: Switch between light and dark modes.
translation.settings.security.title: Privacy & Safety
translation.settings.security.encryption.title: At-Rest Encryption
translation.settings.security.encryption.desc: Encrypt message database with your private key on your device.
translation.settings.security.autoLock.title: Auto-Lock Identity
translation.settings.security.autoLock.desc: Secure your session when you step away from your device.
translation.settings.security.clipboard.title: Clipboard Safety
translation.settings.security.clipboard.desc: Wipe clipboard contents when identity is locked.
translation.settings.security.tor.title: Tor Network (Onion)
translation.settings.security.tor.desc: Route all relay traffic through the Tor network. Required for maximum anonymity.
translation.settings.security.tor.restartRequired: Restart required to apply proxy settings.
translation.settings.security.zeroKnowledge.title: Zero Knowledge Policy
translation.settings.security.zeroKnowledge.desc: Obscur never shares your private keys or unencrypted messages. Security configurations are stored locally and never synced with any remote server.
translation.settings.security.noBlockedFound: No blocked users matching your search.
translation.settings.security.acceptedDesc: **Accepted** peers can see your presence and bypass the request inbox.
translation.settings.security.mutedDesc: **Muted** peers can still message you, but you won't receive notifications.
translation.settings.security.blockedDesc: **Blocked** peers are completely invisible and cannot reach you.
translation.settings.security.quickUnlock.saveDesc: This will update the password used for quick session unlocking on this device.
translation.settings.security.quickUnlock.removeDesc: Warning: Removing this password means you'll need to enter your full private key or passphrase every time you log in. This device will no longer support quick unlocking.
translation.settings.security.passwordResetDesc: Verify your identity to update your master password.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.descript: Verify your identity to update your master password. Your master password encrypts your private key locally. If you've forgotten it, you can reset it using your original private key.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.step.met: Choose how you want to verify your identity.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.step.ver: Verify using your backup private key.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.step.new: Set a new strong master password.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.haveBack: I lost my password but have my key.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.backupKe: Only use this method if you have lost your current master password.
translation.settings.security.passwordReset.successD: Your master password has been successfully updated.
translation.settings.security.action.title: Security Controls
translation.settings.security.action.summary: Security changes are applied locally and persisted immediately.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.title: Attack Mode Trust Controls
translation.settings.security.attackMode.desc: Strict mode quarantines high-risk requests using relay/peer shared-intel evidence. Standard mode keeps requests open with diagnostics.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.profile.sta: Set attack mode profile to standard
translation.settings.security.attackMode.profile.str: Set attack mode profile to strict
translation.settings.security.attackMode.import.past: Paste signed shared-intel JSON before importing.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.import.resu: Imported signals: accepted {{acceptedCount}}, rejected {{rejectedCount}}, stored {{storedSignalCount}}. Rejections: invalid_shape={{invalidShapeRejectedCount}}, expired={{expiredRejectedCount}}, missing_signature_verifier={{missingSignatureVerifierRejectedCount}}, invalid_signature={{invalidSignatureRejectedCount}}.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.import.inva: Shared-intel import failed: invalid JSON payload.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.clear.resul: Cleared all persisted shared-intel signals for this profile.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.undo.none: No reversible trust-control change is available.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.undo.result: Reverted the latest shared-intel trust-control change.
translation.settings.security.attackMode.undo.availa: Undo is available for the latest {{reason}} operation.
translation.settings.security.tor.desktopOnly: Tor routing requires desktop runtime capability.
translation.settings.security.tor.runtime.label: Runtime
translation.settings.security.tor.reachability.label: Reachability
translation.settings.security.tor.bootstrap.label: Bootstrap
translation.settings.security.tor.proxy.label: Proxy
translation.download.title: Download Obscur
translation.download.subtitle:
Secure, local-first messaging for your micro-community.
Available on desktop and web, with mobile coming soon.
translation.download.mobileAppDesc:
Native iOS and Android apps are in development.
In the meantime, you can use the web app on your mobile browser.
translation.search.noUsersFound: No users found. Try an exact match or npub.
translation.search.exactKeyDesc: Paste an exact key or type a name.
translation.search.discoverDesc: Find anyone and anything on the Nostr network.
translation.network.title: Network
translation.network.sharePrompt: Share this link with a friend. It includes your public key and relay hints.
translation.network.shareText: Chat with me on Obscur using my invite link:
translation.network.noIdentityDesc: Create an identity to use the network system.
translation.network.importConnectionsDesc: Import connections from a JSON file
translation.network.importSourceDesc: Import connections from a Nostr connection list (NIP-02 format) or an Obscur export file.
translation.network.importLargeListNote: This may take a moment for large lists
translation.network.exportConnectionsDesc: Export your connections to a JSON file
translation.network.exportSourceDesc: Export all your connections (except blocked ones) to a JSON file that can be imported later.
translation.network.exportFormatDesc: Connections are exported in NIP-02 compatible format.
translation.network.howToPrepare: How to prepare your connection list
translation.network.fileFormatDesc: Your JSON file should contain a connections array with public keys.
translation.network.validationKeys: Public keys must be valid Nostr public keys
translation.network.validationLarge: Large imports may take several minutes
translation.network.rateLimitingDesc: Imports are rate-limited to prevent system overload.
translation.network.desc.unblock: Allow this user to message you again
translation.network.desc.block: Stop receiving messages from this user
translation.network.desc.remove: Remove this user from your trusted network list
translation.network.dialogs.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to remove this connection from your trusted list?
translation.network.dialogs.blockDesc: Are you sure you want to block this user? You will no longer receive their messages?
translation.network.inviteDesc: Select a group to invite this connection to.
translation.network.introPlaceholder: Hi! I'd like to connect with you...
translation.network.noGroupsDesc: Join a group or create your own to chat with multiple people.
translation.network.noRequestsDesc: When people send you a connection request, it will appear here.
translation.network.noBlockedDesc: Users you block will appear here for management.
translation.network.noConnectionsDesc: Network with others to see them here. You can find people by their nickname or public key.
translation.groups.discovery.joinViaPreview: Open the community preview to join through the canonical community flow.
translation.shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
translation.shortcuts.toggleHelp: Press Shift+? to toggle this help
translation.shortcuts.toggleHelpEsc: Press Esc to close this help
translation.invites.title: Add Connection
translation.vault.uploadDesc: Upload your files to an encrypted NIP-96 storage provider.
translation.vault.successDesc: Your file is now stored in your personal vault.
translation.vault.headerDesc: Your decentralized, E2EE media storage. Locally aggregated and securely synced.
translation.vault.emptyDesc: Shared images and videos from your chats will appear here automatically.
translation.vault.noIdentityDesc: Create an identity to access your encrypted media vault.
translation.onboarding.contact.title: Build Your Network
translation.onboarding.contact.desc: Have a friend's invite code? Enter it below to start your first private conversation.
translation.auth.rememberMe: Keep me logged in on this device
translation.settings.storage.desc: Configure local-first media storage, cache behavior, and NIP-96 upload providers.
translation.settings.storage.localVaultDesc: Cache sent and received files locally. Relays are used for encrypted transmission only.
translation.settings.storage.localRootPlaceholder: Leave empty to use app data
translation.settings.storage.localRootHelp: Choose a custom folder in File Explorer for local media storage.
translation.settings.storage.pathAvailableInDesktop: Local path is available in desktop runtime
translation.settings.notifications.perConversationDe: Tip: use the bell icon in each chat header to mute or unmute notifications for a specific user or group.
translation.settings.relays.connectivityDesc: Basic mode uses optimized default relays. Active: {{active}}/{{total}}
translation.settings.relays.advancedConfigDesc: Manually add, sort, and enable specific relay nodes for maximum redundancy.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.noRelayConfigure: Add at least one relay in Settings -> Relays.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.noWritableRelays: Messages can queue locally, but relay-backed delivery is currently unavailable.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.configuredHealth: Configured relays are healthy again. Fallback relays may remain connected temporarily as standby coverage.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.communicationHea: Configured relays are writable and this window is seeing recent relay events.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.eventFlowDegrade: Sockets are open, but this window has not seen recent relay events.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.connectivityDegr: Fallback relays are active; connectivity is working with reduced trust and redundancy.
translation.settings.relays.runtime.partialUtilityDe: Some configured relays are unavailable or partially useful. Review individual relay status below.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.disabled: This relay is configured for the profile but currently disabled.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.backoffRetry: Repeated failures triggered backoff. Next retry is scheduled automatically.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.connecting: The runtime is actively establishing this relay connection.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.lastAttemptF: The last relay connection attempt failed.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.fallbackActi: This relay is connected as temporary fallback coverage, not primary configured transport.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.degraded: This relay is connected, but it is still being evaluated after recent failures.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.highLatency: The socket is open, but observed latency is high enough to reduce delivery quality.
translation.settings.storage.effectiveModeDesc: Derived from active provider and local vault toggles.
translation.settings.storage.reliabilityCoreV087Desc: Adaptive relay scoring + quorum publishing, sync checkpoint/backfill controls, and storage resilience diagnostics.
translation.settings.storage.stabilityModeV090Desc: Forces the safe Add Friend path (contact card/npub/pubkey) and hides unstable discovery UI.
translation.settings.storage.deterministicDiscoveryV: Resolver + request outbox experimental flow. Requires Rust protocol core and stability mode disabled.
translation.settings.storage.protocolCoreRustV090Des: Enables runtime adapters backed by Rust protocol contracts for identity/session/outbox paths.
translation.settings.storage.x3dhRatchetV090Desc: Enables the full rewritten E2EE handshake/session path. Keep off until Wave C gates pass.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryRolloutFlagsDe: Guard incremental discovery lanes while keeping deterministic add as the canonical path.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryInviteCodeDesc: Allow `OBSCUR-*` code resolution in Add Friend.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryDeepLinkDesc: Route `obscur://contact?...` links to deterministic Add Friend resolve.
translation.settings.storage.discoverySuggestionsDes: Show local-cache candidate suggestions on empty Add Friend search.
translation.settings.storage.tanstackQueryDesc: Enable guarded Query adapters for discovery, identity resolve, relay diagnostics, and account-sync readers.
translation.auth.keyOwnershipReminder: You own your private key. Obscur cannot recover accounts for lost keys or forgotten passwords.
translation.auth.keyRecoveryReminder: Back up your private key now and verify export in Settings > Identity after login.
translation.auth.error.secureStorageResetUnavailable: Secure storage reset is not available in this runtime.
translation.auth.secureStorageResetSuccess: Secure storage reset. You can now unlock this profile manually.
translation.auth.error.invalidPrivateKeyFormat: Invalid private key. Enter a valid `nsec` or 64-character hex key.
translation.auth.error.retiredKeyRequiresAcknowledge: This private key was previously retired on this device. Confirm reactivation before continuing.
translation.auth.error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
translation.auth.error.noLocalAccountYet: No local account exists on this device yet. Import your private key first, then you can use username/password unlock locally.
translation.auth.error.enterPasswordOrSkip: Please enter a password or skip
translation.auth.error.retiredKeyImportRequiresAckno: This private key was previously retired on this device. Confirm reactivation before importing.
translation.auth.keyAcceptedDeviceUnlock: Key accepted. Device-only unlock was created for this profile.
translation.auth.secureStorageRecoveryDesc: Native auto-unlock was skipped for this profile.
translation.auth.secureStorageRecoveryHint: You can also continue with your password or private key below.
translation.auth.privateKeyMismatchDesc: The entered private key does not match the account stored on this profile.
translation.auth.privateKeyMismatchHint: Import the correct key for this profile, or switch to the intended account before continuing.
translation.auth.welcome.subtitle: The most private way to communicate. Decentralized & anonymous.
translation.auth.create.pickNameDesc: This will be your visible profile name.
translation.auth.create.secureItDesc: Set a password to protect your keys.
translation.auth.passwordGenerated: Password generated. Please save it securely.
translation.auth.passwordRecoveryWarning: There is no password recovery. If you lose this password and device, your account may be unrecoverable. You can log in from any device using your private key, so never lose it.
translation.auth.acknowledgeKeyResponsibility: I understand I am responsible for my keys
translation.auth.login.welcomeBackDesc: Log in or import your identity.
translation.auth.login.secureSessionDesc: You can set a password now, or skip and use your key directly.
translation.auth.login.deviceLocalHint: Username/password unlock is device-local. Import your private key once on this device to enable it.
translation.auth.import.privateKeyHelp: Import Key restores an existing account only. If this key has no local or relay-backed account evidence, use Create Account instead.
translation.auth.import.retiredKeyWarning: This key was previously marked as retired on this device. Reactivating it can restore prior identity links from relays.
translation.auth.import.retiredKeyAcknowledge: I understand and want to reactivate this identity on this device
translation.auth.optionalPasswordHelp: Leave blank to use key-only login. If Remember Me is enabled, a device-only unlock will be created.
translation.search.discovery.identity.unsupportedTok: Use a contact card, npub, or hex pubkey for Add Friend.
translation.search.discovery.identity.legacyUnresolv: Invite code could not be resolved. Ask for QR/contact link/npub.
translation.search.discovery.reason.relayDegraded: Relay network is degraded. Showing partial results.
translation.search.discovery.reason.offline: Offline mode: only cached and local results are available.
translation.search.discovery.reason.unsupportedToken: Use deterministic add tokens: QR, contact card, Friend Code, npub, or pubkey.
translation.search.discovery.reason.invalidCode: Invalid code format. Ask for a new code, QR, or contact link.
translation.search.discovery.reason.expiredCode: Code expired. Ask for a new short code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.codeUsed: Code already used. Ask for a new short code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.legacyUnresolvab: Legacy code could not be resolved. Ask for QR/contact link/Friend Code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.indexFallback: Index unavailable and relay fallback degraded. Use QR/contact card/npub.
translation.search.discovery.relay.recovering: Obscur is rebuilding relay connections. Search is using direct, cached, and index results first.
translation.search.discovery.relay.degraded: Relay connections are degraded. Search may return partial results while recovery continues.
translation.search.discovery.relay.offline: No relay connection is available. Search is limited to direct, cached, and local results.
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriendDe: Paste a contact card, short code, invite code, npub, or pubkey
Paste a contact card, short code, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriendLe: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriend: Paste a contact card, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.communities: Search communities by name or relay'group
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.global: Search people, communities, npubs, nip-05 handles, or public keys
translation.search.discovery.hero.title: One search box for your network
translation.search.discovery.hero.desc: Find people and communities, then open their public profile or switch to direct add when you already have a private contact token.
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.title: Resolve one exact account
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.descLegacy: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key. Obscur should resolve one exact person here, not bury you under a fuzzy discovery list.
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.desc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key. Obscur should resolve one exact person here, not bury you under a fuzzy discovery list.
translation.search.discovery.diagnostics.title: Rollout visibility
translation.search.discovery.diagnostics.desc: Local diagnostics for discovery lookup quality and conversion events in this session.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.title: Use this person or reject the token
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.resolvingDes: Obscur is resolving the token against deterministic identity paths.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.noExactDescL: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key in the search bar above.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.noExactDesc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key in the search bar above.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.emptyDescLeg: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key and the exact account will appear here.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.emptyDesc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key and the exact account will appear here.
translation.search.discovery.empty.title: No Results
translation.search.discovery.empty.descPrefix: Try a name, a nip-05 handle, an npub, a public key, or a community identifier like
translation.search.discovery.start.title: Start with a global search
translation.search.discovery.start.desc: Look up people and communities from one place, then open a profile, send an invitation, or switch to direct add when someone shares a private contact token.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.queueHint: Obscur will queue this invitation if relays are not ready yet, and the delivery timeline below will show confirmed progress.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.deliveryHint: Obscur will only mark this invitation as delivered after relay evidence comes back.
translation.search.discovery.share.title: Share My Contact
translation.search.discovery.share.desc: Use short code, contact link/card, npub/pubkey, or QR.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.title: Invitation Delivery
translation.search.discovery.invitation.timelineDesc: This timeline shows what Obscur has actually confirmed so far.
translation.search.discovery.suggestions.title: Friend Suggestions
translation.search.discovery.suggestions.desc: Local suggestions from recent identity metadata. Nothing new is published when viewing this list.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.attemptingDe: Obscur is trying to deliver your invitation.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.timeout: Request timed out. Relay quality is degraded; please retry.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.partial: Invitation reached part of the network.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.waitingForRe: Delivery is waiting for a healthier relay connection.
